rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.0453 governs information provided to teacher certification candidates. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.0453. INFORMATION FOR CANDIDATES FOR TEACHER CERTIFICATION.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
